pre_registered_rule: Removing protected features reduces Gender DP gap by at least 80%.
AgeGroup DP gap exceeds Gender DP gap by at least 0.05.
Reweighting reduces Gender DP gap by at least 25% and decreases ROC-AUC or F1.
RandomForest improves ROC-AUC by at least 0.02 but does not necessarily improve fairness.
